overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a sci-fi spaceship flying low over a cratered lunar surface in space. The ship maintains steady altitude while traversing the gray rocky terrain under a star-filled black sky, with glowing blue thrusters visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude space flight over cratered moon terrain

agents.ego_description: piloting a twin-engine spaceship in steady low-altitude flight over the lunar surface, maintaining course while the cratered terrain passes below

entered.detail: gray cratered moon terrain with rocky texture and scattered debris passing below the spacecraft
distant stars scattered across the black space background

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies steadily over the barren lunar landscape, with the gray cratered surface filling the lower frame and stars visible in the black sky above. The ship's blue thrusters glow steadily as it maintains a low altitude course over the rocky terrain, with various craters and rock formations passing by beneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a spaceship as it glides across a desolate, cratered lunar expanse. It begins with the vessel maintaining a steady low altitude, its glowing blue thrusters contrasting against the monochromatic gray of the rocky terrain. As the ship advances, the camera captures a succession of deep craters and jagged rock formations passing rapidly beneath the hull. The scene remains focused on this rhythmic traversal of the barren surface, with the star-filled black sky providing a constant, silent backdrop to the ship's forward momentum.
